description_long: This vending machine is a tall, rectangular unit with a predominantly white and blue color scheme, accented by a black top and side panel. The front features a large, visually striking graphic with water imagery, a bottle, and an eye, along with the text 'Blu3 Tap.' The right side displays a dynamic blue dot pattern and an image of a water pouch, while the left side has a more minimal design with the word 'BLU3' in large blue letters. The front panel includes a vertical array of product selection buttons, a display panel, and a product retrieval slot at the bottom. The machine appears to be constructed mainly from metal and plastic, with a glossy, smooth finish. Its overall design suggests it dispenses water or water-related products, and it is suitable for placement in urban public spaces.
description: A tall, rectangular vending machine with a white, blue, and black color scheme, featuring water-themed graphics and a vertical button panel on the front. The design is modern and visually engaging, likely dispensing water or related products.
description_view_0: The left side of the vending machine, showing the large 'BLU3' text in blue and a minimal water-themed graphic.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying the main branding, water imagery, product selection buttons, display panel, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_2: The right side, featuring a blue dot pattern and an image of a water pouch, with minimal branding.
description_view_3: The rear view, which is plain and solid black with no visible features or graphics.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right section of the front face, above the product selection buttons. It appears to be a digital or illuminated area for instructions or information.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the front, to the right of the display panel and above the selection buttons, featuring slots likely for coins and bills, and possibly a card reader.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Five rectangular, vertically aligned product selection buttons are present on the right side of the front panel, each with a label or indicator next to it.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal product retrieval slot is located at the bottom center of the front panel, with a black opening.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding includes the large 'Blu3 Tap' text and water-themed graphics on the front, 'BLU3' in blue on the left side, and blue dot patterns on the right side, all prominently displayed in white and blue colors.
